svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

+ get_instance(): DataStore

+ add_producto(data): Dict

+ add_compra(data): Dict
+ get_alertas_stock(): List" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="280" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;rounded=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="660" y="120" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="120" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="90" /> <mxPoint x="660" y="90" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="660" y="90" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Courier New;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="if _instance is None:
 with _lock:
 if _instance is None:
 _instance = DataStore()
return _instance" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="280" x="380" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="dashed=1;endArrow=none;" target="9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 330px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
- instance: DataStore
- lock: threading.Lock
- productos: List
- ventas: List
- compras: List

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 141px; margin-left: 330px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:

+ add_compra(data): Dict

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 192), rgb(26, 26, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(153, 153, 0), rgb(125, 125, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 320px; margin-left: 330px;
